title: Methods with special names should have an expected number of parameters
description: Special methods like `__init__`, `__str__`, `__repr__`, etc., should have the expected number of parameters.
message: Method with special name has an unexpected number of parameters.
recommendation: Use the expected number of parameters for special methods.
why_is_this_an_issue: Special methods with an unexpected number of parameters can lead to confusion and potential errors.
how_to_fix: Adjust the number of parameters in the special method to match the expected number.

metadata.title: Methods with special names should have an expected number of parameters
